heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds, mild, with a chance of localized passing showers. Lows in the 50s. Southwest wind near 10, gusting to 20 mph through the Champlain Valley and over the higher terrain.

heading: Sunday
text: Partly cloudy in the morning, becoming mostly sunny. Highs from near 70 north, into the upper 70s as you head south, 80s in the warmest valleys. Winds becoming northwest near 10 mph.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly clear, with some passing clouds. Lows through the 40s, nearing 50 in the Champlain Valley.
